title: Run
description: A row from the durable runs table. Returned by GET /v1/runs and GET /v1/runs/{id} (with on-disk manifest details merged in).

run_id.description: 128-bit id as 32 lowercase hex chars — a valid W3C/OpenTelemetry trace id, so the run is addressable by this id in any OTLP backend. (Pre-2026-06 runs carry a legacy timestamp-style id.)

trace_id.description: Equals run_id — one canonical id. Since run_id is now a W3C trace id, this is the trace's id in any OTLP backend; one trace per run.

state.description: Lifecycle state. `orphaned` = the row was running when a prior aitelier process exited; Sandbox Agent has no resume API yet, so it's terminal.

agent_id.description: Agent backend name (claude, codex, ...) when kind=agent.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock run duration in milliseconds (ended_at − started_at); null until the run ends. Maps to the OTel span duration.

parent_run_id.description: Optional pointer to a parent run for multi-agent workflows. Pure pass-through: aitelier records it and lets consumers query `/v1/runs?parent_run_id=X`, but enforces no semantics (no FK, no cycle check, no cascade). Orchestrators above aitelier own the meaning.

sandbox_backend.description: `local` if the SA URL is loopback, `remote` otherwise. Stamped at agent-call time.

sandbox_server_id.description: ACP server_id this run was bound to. Future SA session-resume APIs can adopt it.

environment.description: Snapshot of mcp_servers + tool_allowlist at run time.

input_tokens.description: Null when the backend reported no usage (some agent backends) or the run isn't finalized — distinct from a real 0.

system_prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the system prompt actually sent to the provider; lets dashboards group runs by prompt variant.

result.description: Final result payload from the run. For LLM/embed kinds: the OpenAI-shape response body. For agent kinds: the aggregated done event (content, finish_reason, usage, tool_calls). Empty object if the run hasn't reached a terminal state.

request_body.description: Caller's request body as received (pre-fold, pre-translate). For ChatCompletionRequest / AsyncRunRequest / EmbeddingsRequest. Null for historical runs from before the v4 storage migration. Projection-redacted at the HTTP boundary.

rendered_messages.description: Message list after aitelier's agent-path translations (system-prompt fold, response_format injection) — what actually went on the wire. Null when no translation applies (embed runs, pre-v4 runs).

manifest.description: On-disk run manifest (runs/{id}/manifest.json), merged in by GET /v1/runs/{id} when present.

prompt.description: On-disk rendered prompt (runs/{id}/prompt.txt), merged in by GET /v1/runs/{id} when present.
